slides.body:
Your first instinct is to say yes immediately. TERRITORY
UK-only and global use are fundamentally different deals. Know both before you sign anything.

Here's why that's the most expensive reaction in sync. ↓ TERM LENGTH
One-off vs. rolling vs. in-perpetuity are three different contracts.
When a placement offer lands, you have exactly one negotiation window. Before you sign, here's what experienced composers always check:

THE UPFRONT FEE
The first number is an opening bid — not the final price. PERFORMANCE ROYALTIES
These are separate from your upfront fee.

EXCLUSIVITY PERIOD
"Exclusive" locks your track for a window — no other placements during that time.

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.body: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
